assessor_1_raw: Heart failure readmission prediction: well-designed with temporal split, IHF cohort definition, and comprehensive clinical features. ROC-AUC with calibration and decision curve analysis is appropriate. Measurement frequency confound check is critical for clinical EHR data. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Sound clinical prediction design. GRU/transformer for irregular time series vs. logistic regression is a fair comparison. Planned readmission exclusion with manual verification is thorough. Site-stratified AUC enables confound detection. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses ROC-AUC for risk triage. Decision curve analysis is an excellent clinical utility metric. The sensitivity analysis for measurement frequency confound is important for clinical EHR studies. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous defense_wins from all three assessors.
